title: UFO Turned a Forgotten Thesis Into 165% Returns While the S&P Gained 11%
description: $10,000 parked in the Procure Space ETF (NYSEARCA:UFO) on May 29, 2025 at $24.64 was worth roughly $26,500 twelve months later, and most of that move happened in the last four months. UFO closed last Friday at $65.31, up 69% year to date and 165% over the trailing year. The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust ... UFO Turned a Forgotten Thesis Into 165% Returns While the S&P Gained 11%

title: UFO query leaves Ministry of External Affairs spokesperson smiling
description: The Ministry of External Affairs briefing ventured into extraterrestrial territory when a journalist asked whether India and the United States had ever discussed Unidentified Aerial Phenomena (UAPs), more commonly known as UFOs. The unexpected question appeared to catch MEA spokesperson Randhir Jaiswal off guard, drawing a smile before he admitted that the subject was a [...]

title: 'China’s Nostradamus' claims US UFO files are distraction as he predicts more 'atrocities'
description: “China’s Nostradamus” Jiang Xueqin has branded Trump’s newly released UFO files “complete nonsense” and “complete BS”, telling YouTuber Sneako the alien talk is a distraction

title: Ex-CIA 'psychic spy' exposes 'alien bases with UFO repair shops hidden inside mountains'
description: Former CIA psychic spy Lyn Buchanan has claimed he uncovered the coordinates of four top-secret alien bases buried deep inside remote mountains around the world
